triage_rows.key_reason: Discovery starts with a negative gap and both external and chronology checks fail.
This is not a weak branch but a reversed branch; the direction is wrong on the external pool.
No candidate or soft-component budget is justified once the external pool gap is negative and time splits remain sub-0.5.

interpretation: V1.18R is the scheduled three-run adversarial triage over the reclaim-absorption branch.
All three reviewers converged without ambiguity: the branch is dead, not merely weak.
The project should spend zero additional budget on reclaim-absorption and reopen discovery on a different quality-side axis.
